Name: DNS Tool - Domain Security Intelligence
Description: Intelligence-grade domain security analysis. RFC-compliant DNS auditing with ICD 203 confidence scoring, FAIR-principled data delivery, and Zenodo DOI-backed reproducibility. Returns 15 enriched intelligence artifacts per query.
Info: DNS Security Intelligence — RFC-grounded domain analysis with Bayesian confidence scoring. Returns enriched reports with security badges, observed-records snapshots (SHA-3-512), DNS topology maps, Wayback Machine archives, CSV exports, remediation playbooks, and Zotero-compatible citation metadata. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18854899. Plugin homepage: https://dnstool.it-help.tech/agent/plugin
